scope: Add and verify an archive provider, signed-link, remote migration, and retention-policy handoff after rebuild added scoped archive manifests.
selected_figma_slice: Archive provider failure, signed/scoped link, remote D1 migration, and retention policy state handoff.

node_touched.name: Prototype / 19 / Archive provider and retention handoff
changes: Added state cards for Drive credentials missing, provider unavailable retry, generation queued, scoped package ready, retention window expiring, and policy review required.

Mapped archive delivery UI to /api/admin/exports/student-archive, /api/exports/:id/download, /api/student/archive/readiness, /api/evidence/drive-probe, /api/submissions/:id/evidence/upload, and /admin/audit.
Mapped records ExportRequest, StudentArchiveExport, ExportArtifact, EvidenceArtifact, EvidenceRepository, AuditEvent, RetentionPolicy, UserGroupRole, RequirementProgress, and Deadline.
Recorded Cloudflare token and Google Drive credential blockers as implementation/deployment setup context, not Figma blockers.

permission_scopes: program teacher readiness only unless explicit export scope exists
misc admin denied by default unless explicit export/reporting scope exists
guardrails: storage identifiers never render to clients
download expiry and retry paths are visible
retention values remain configurable until school policy is confirmed
audit writes cover request, generation, denied, expiry, retry, and download events
fake .test accounts only until real student data is authorized
acceptance_checks: missing Drive secrets blocks package success
provider unavailable returns retry state and audit event
remote migration pending is visible until migration 0007 is verified
download response includes expiry and scope
expired package denies bytes and offers regeneration
no storage IDs, stack traces, or fake account shortcuts render
blockers: CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN missing for remote D1 migration verification
GOOGLE_DRIVE_CLIENT_EMAIL and GOOGLE_DRIVE_PRIVATE_KEY missing for live Drive delivery
